questions.q: According to reports from late April 2026, why was former FBI Director James Comey indicted for a second time?
options: For posting a photo of seashells spelling '86 47,' which was interpreted as a threat against President Trump
For leaking classified surveillance footage from the White House
For perjuring himself during a congressional hearing on the Russia investigation
For misusing federal funds to publish his latest autobiography
questions.correctText: For posting a photo of seashells spelling '86 47,' which was interpreted as a threat against President Trump

questions.q: On April 28, 2026, the Justice Department indicted Dr. David Morens, a former senior adviser to Dr. Anthony Fauci. What was the primary charge?
options: Using a private email account to intentionally hide communications related to COVID-19 research
Accepting illicit kickbacks from a major pharmaceutical company
Falsifying data in a federally funded study on respiratory viruses
Providing classified health data to a foreign government
questions.correctText: Using a private email account to intentionally hide communications related to COVID-19 research

questions.q: Why did General Motors announce in its Q1 2026 results that it expects a $500 million tariff refund?
options: A Supreme Court ruling invalidated the IEEPA tariffs previously imposed by the Trump administration
The United States-Mexico-Canada Agreement (USMCA) was retroactively amended
A federal judge ruled that GM was exempt from aluminum and steel import taxes
The EPA offered a tax rebate for exceeding electric vehicle manufacturing quotas
questions.correctText: A Supreme Court ruling invalidated the IEEPA tariffs previously imposed by the Trump administration

questions.q: What detail emerged in late April 2026 regarding the Secret Service agent who was shot in the chest during an assassination attempt on President Trump?
options: The agent may have been hit by 'friendly fire' from another Secret Service member
The agent was targeted by a drone operated by the suspect
The agent's ballistic vest failed to stop a small-caliber projectile
The agent managed to disarm the attacker without firing a single shot
questions.correctText: The agent may have been hit by 'friendly fire' from another Secret Service member
